title: Describing Periodic Motion
body: The hour hand of the large clock on the wall in Union Station measures $$24$$ inches in length. At noon, the tip of the hour hand is $$30$$ inches from the ceiling. At $$3$$ PM, the tip is $$54$$ inches from the ceiling, and at $$6$$ PM, $$78$$ inches. At $$9$$ PM, it is again $$54$$ inches from the ceiling, and at midnight, the tip of the hour hand returns to its original position $$30$$ inches from the ceiling. Let $$y$$ equal the distance from the tip of the hour hand to the ceiling $$x$$ hours after noon. Find the equation that models the motion of the clock and sketch the graph.
